title: Slovakian Pilaf with French Flair
description: A hearty pilaf dish infused with the flavors of Slovakia and the finesse of French cuisine. This recipe combines fluffy pilaf with traditional Slovakian ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Slovakian pilaf and fluffy rice, stirring to combine.
Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the pilaf is lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
